both ATTACK and DEFENSE.

An attack that
may cause a burn.

by 1/2.

hurts the user.

moves.description:
Reduces the foe's
accuracy.

moves.name: seismic-toss
moves.description:
The user's level
equals damage HP.

moves.name: gravity

for five turns, making

unusable and
negating Levitation.

moves.description:
A powerful first-
strike move.

moves.name: quick-attack
moves.description:
Lets the user get
in the first hit.

moves.name: quick-guard
moves.description:
The user protects itself and its allies
